title: Chapter 14
content:
Chapter 14: Pervert

Denzel slowly peeked through the opening on the door, it was little but enough for him to get a view inside.

He froze as his eyes landed on the moaning culprit

It was none other than Aisha, the saucy bitch

Aisha sat alone on the edge of her huge bed, her thick thighs were pressed together as her hands slowly rubbed deep in between them.

It went in a soft and swift motion, up and down as she moved her body all aroused and filled with excitement

" Wooww...what the hell" Denzel spoke out in a light voice heard only by himself

His breath was caught in his throat as he was still amazed at what he was seeing.

Aisha hadn’t noticed him yet, with how aroused she was at the moment, even if the door was wide open and Denzel was standing right in front of it, she probably wouldn’t notice still.

She kept on moving her fingers in a slow sensual motion deep in between her thighs, shifting and adjusting her body slightly and her head arching back in excitement.

The thin fabric of her loose skirt made it worse. Every movement she made dragged Denzel deeper into his dangerous thoughts

His cock was alreading throbbing hard and the bulge was now visible on his pants.

’She’s saucy but damn...she’s so fucking hot, I can’t even deny that’ Denzel thought as he covered the growing bulge with one of his palms.

’And damn...she is beautiful. Maria level candidate. I knew she was beautiful before but now she beat the image I had of her before. Can’t wait to see her face when I bend her over and ram my cock inside her till she drops’

He gulped hard

’Thinking about it deeply now, her husband, the village chief, according to her is rarely ever around. The man was always "busy" leaving his bitch all alone at home this horny’

’That should be a crime worthy of banishment leaving this bitch here without a cock in her pussy’

Suddenly after a bit of thinking, the scene before him started to make a lot more sense.

’But honestly? I don’t give a crap about her husband, I could care less. In fact, him not being around is a win for me. I can take up his manly duties while he is away...hehe’

After a long thought, a wide grin slowly crept onto his face.

’So how exactly am I supposed to capitalise on this?’ Denzel thought

He put his eyes on his jaw thinking of a plan to fuck this horny bitch and that was when it clicked

’That’s right, I still have the skill. Right, I almost forgot about it or maybe not. I already planned on using it tonight on Sophia to finish unfinished business from yesterday’

’But desperate times call for desperate measures, it’s still 2hrs before bedtime. It should be cooled down and ready for another use by bed time’

’Now, how am I going to approach her without ruining the moment and use my skill on her’ Denzel thought

Denzel calmed himself down very quickly, trying his best not to ask on impulse and devour her

But he couldn’t just waltz into her room like some desperate idiot.

Aisha was already uptight, strict and noticeably sharp tongued around him, or rather around every man due to a toxic relationship with her husband

If he just barged into the room so suddenly especially without being told to, she would probably throw something directly at his head while slurring insults at him even before he could explain

’No...Just waltzing in won’t work. I have to make it look natural’ Denzel thought

He looked around him trying to conjure up and plan and then his eyes landed on the remaining boxes left for him to take downstairs in the next room

A slow and wide grin appeared across his face...he had thought of a plan

’Perfect’ he thought

He walked into the room with the boxes and picked it up easily and walked back to the room where Aisha was, pretending like he had unfinished work with a little whistle.

And then, with very careful timing, Denzel purposefully threw the box against the side of the door to the room where Aisha was in

BAM!

"Agh-!"

Denzel threw himself forward right after the box, stumbling dramatically into the room and rolled towards the direction of Aisha.

The scream he let out, though exaggerated was enough to deceive the normal person, in this case his target... Aisha

The box scattered all around him as he hit the floor

Aisha was filled with shock

"Huh!...What the hell!"

And for a split second, their eyes met

Instantly, Aisha adjusted herself awkwardly and pulled herself together. Her hands moved quickly enough to cover up herself the best she could

"You cunt! What the hell is wrong with you!" Aisha snapped

Denzel noticed that she didn’t fully cover herself well and her curved smooth thighs were still bare

Denzel’s pulse skyrocketed

He slowly lifted himself upward, pretending to wince in slight pain.

"Damn...I...I slipped" Denzel spoke

"I said it from the start, you’re an idiot" Aisha shot back at him immediately

"What type of man falls through a door carrying a damn box, one as light as that?!" She continued

Denzel didn’t react, in fact he almost burst into laughter but held himself back

’This bitch is still rude even after getting caught doing such suspicious things in the dark’ Denzel thought

Meanwhile, Aisha kept on talking and was clearly annoyed, but Denzel barely heard half of what she was saying

His mind was already locked into something else entirely

’One touch...all I need is one touch to make this slut shut up and submit to me’

As she continued scolding him, Denzel stepped closer to her, acting like he was trying to pick up the fallen boxes

Then he got close enough and placed his palm on her bare thighs

~Anhhhnnn~

Still sensitive, she let out a small moan

As he got what looked like a signal he proceeded to push his hands deeper into her thighs

’This skill never fails. One touch and all women submi–’

Before he could finish his sentence, Aisha’s palm met his face in a swift motion and sent him on the floor

"You freaking pervert! You are fired and don’t let me see you again freak" Aisha spoke

She walked out of the door and Denzel was left alone still trying to process what just happened

"Huh? Doesn’t the skill work anymore? What the fuck just happened" Denzel said unable to comprehen
